item.title: Couldn't have happened to a scuzzier guy
item.description: "As sales continue to plummet worldwide, Tesla is giving up on building an in-house supercomputer for computer vision processing as part of its advanced driver assistance system." Sauce: https://futurism.com/tesla-shutting-down-ai-supercomputer
item.dc:creator: Johje19

item.title: John Oliver on Dean Cain joining ICE: "On the plus side, no need for that guy to wear a mask because the chances of anyone recognizing him are fucking zero."
item.description: “I’m not saying that ICE isn’t finding people. I’m just saying, when you are reduced to pinning a badge on the 59-year-old star of ‘The Dog Who Saved Christmas,’ ‘The Dog Who Saved Christmas Vacation,’ ‘The Dog Who Saved Holidays,’ ‘The Dog Who Saved Halloween,’ ‘The Dog Who Saved Easter’ and ‘The Dog Who Saved Summer,’ maybe you are in trouble." Sauce: https://variety.com/2025/tv/news/john-oliver-slams-dean-cain-joining-ice-1236486415/
item.dc:creator: Johje19

item.title: Breaking - AlsoAshley Out Of Cosplay...
item.description:
Let me shake the illusion of all you fine "You would look great in a burlap sack" folks, by revealing my "In a long line at a Staples at 7:45pm" fit...
Also HA! Gotcha... My Poison Ivy cosplay here to juxtapose... Also, I'm giving big thanks to everyone over on my YouTube today! Don't miss out! https://youtu.be/aPVhY0Fc13U
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley
